description: A dark, swirling composition depicting the interior of what appears to be a large pearl oyster shell. The surface is rendered in iridescent blues, grays, and silvery tones, with spiral and organic forms creating a vortex-like effect. A small nude female figure reclines at the lower right, and other small figures or organic forms are scattered around the edges. The overall impression is of a watery, dreamlike grotto or the nacreous interior of a massive shell.
